LCC-HS9-L3-BR300-HSALG1-ESC-MNA-01 • HS Math: Algebra I • Rewriting Expressions (Factoring, Completing the Square, Exponent Properties)

The Brass Plaque

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the boy figuring out how to do?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the boy say “three times three is nine, three plus three is six”?
3QUESTION 3: What does the girl mean when she says she “almost waved a proctor over”?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
